description: ComfyUI-aware heuristic hints for proactive diagnostics (F18). Diagnostic enrichment only; no malware verdicts.

rules.title: Placeholder or Example Model Path
rules.summary: A loader node appears to use a placeholder/example model path or unresolved TODO value.
recommendation: Replace placeholder text with a real installed model path or model selection.
Verify the model file exists in the expected ComfyUI models directory.

rules.title: Possible Missing Asset / Unconfigured Loader
rules.summary: A loader-related widget value contains text suggesting a missing file or an unconfigured asset.
recommendation: Check the referenced model/asset exists and is selected in the loader node.
Re-open the node UI and confirm dropdown selections are not left in an error placeholder state.

rules.title: Sampler Denoise Value Looks Out of Range
rules.summary: A sampler node has a denoise-like numeric value outside the typical 0.0-1.0 range.
recommendation: Verify denoise/noise strength parameters are within the expected range for your sampler node.
If this is intentional, you can ignore this diagnostic hint.

rules.title: LLM Endpoint / Model Naming Mismatch Hint
rules.summary: Doctor settings metadata suggests a local LLM endpoint but a cloud-style model name, which may indicate a configuration mismatch.
recommendation: Verify the selected model name exists on the configured local endpoint (Ollama/LMStudio).
If you intended a cloud provider, check the Base URL setting.
